summary: Iteration 128: Tested Menu Items with Size Variants, Add-ons, and Branch-Specific Pricing. All 8 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: POST/GET/PUT menu items with modifiers (Size/Add-ons), branch_prices, Add Item dialog with 5 tabs (Details/Sizes/Add-ons/Branches/Platforms), edit item loads sizes and addons correctly, Cashier POS shows modifier selection dialog with Size and Extras options.
critical_code_review_comments: Code looks well-structured with proper separation of Size and Add-ons modifiers
The handleEdit function correctly parses modifiers into sizes and addons arrays for the form
The handleSave function correctly converts sizes/addons back to modifiers format
seed_data_creation: Test menu items created during testing were cleaned up by test fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 128: Verified Menu Items with Modifiers feature. Add Item dialog has 5 tabs with data-testid: sizes-tab, addons-tab, branches-tab, platforms-tab. Add buttons: add-size-btn, add-addon-btn. Size inputs: size-name-{i}, size-price-{i}. Addon inputs: addon-name-{i}, addon-price-{i}. Branch toggles: branch-toggle-{id}. Branch prices: branch-price-{id}. Chicken Shawarma item has Size modifiers (Regular/Large with prices 0/8) and Extras (Extra Garlic/Cheese/Pickles). Cashier POS shows modifier selection dialog when clicking items with 'Has options' badge.

backend_create_menu_item_with_modifiers.test_case: Create item with Size and Add-ons modifiers plus branch_prices
backend_create_menu_item_with_modifiers.details: Modifiers saved correctly with required/multiple flags and options with prices

backend_get_menu_items_with_modifiers.details: Returns Size and Add-on groups with all options

backend_get_single_item_modifiers.test_case: Single item returns full modifier details
backend_get_single_item_modifiers.details: Each option has name and price fields

backend_update_menu_item_modifiers.details: Can add new size/addon options and update branch-specific prices

backend_modifiers_persist_after_update.details: GET after PUT returns updated options

backend_create_item_without_modifiers.details: Works as baseline - modifiers array is empty

backend_cashier_view_menu_with_modifiers.test_case: Cashier can view menu items with modifiers

frontend_add_item_dialog_has_5_tabs.test_case: Add Item dialog shows Details, Sizes, Add-ons, Branches, Platforms tabs
frontend_add_item_dialog_has_5_tabs.details: All 5 tabs visible with correct data-testid attributes

frontend_sizes_tab_add_size_button.test_case: Add Size button adds size input row with name and price fields

frontend_addons_tab_add_option_button.test_case: Add Option button adds addon input row

frontend_branches_tab_price_input.test_case: Branch price input appears when branch is toggled on
frontend_branches_tab_price_input.details: 6 branches available, price input shows for selected branches

frontend_edit_item_loads_sizes.test_case: Edit existing item loads size modifiers correctly
frontend_edit_item_loads_sizes.details: Chicken Shawarma shows Regular (0) and Large (8)

frontend_edit_item_loads_branch_prices.test_case: Edit existing item shows branch-specific prices

frontend_item_cards_show_modifier_badges.test_case: Item cards display modifier count badges
frontend_item_cards_show_modifier_badges.details: Found 9 modifier badges (Size: X, Extras: Y format)

frontend_pos_modifier_dialog.test_case: Modifier selection dialog shows Size and Extras options
frontend_pos_modifier_dialog.details: Clicking item with modifiers opens dialog with Regular/Large sizes and Extra Garlic/Cheese/Pickles extras

frontend_pos_cart_shows_modifiers.test_case: Cart shows selected modifiers and correct price
frontend_pos_cart_shows_modifiers.details: Cart shows 'Chicken Shawarma +Large +Extra Garlic SAR 35 each' with correct total

tests: Add Item dialog has 5 tabs - PASS
